review_summary uses review_item_ids as the payload field for declared join key review_item_id.
review_summary uses review_event_ids as the payload field for declared join key event_id.
review_summary uses recompute_marker_ids as the payload field for declared join key marker_id.
scoring_view energy_facts do not carry candidate_id; join via canonical_evidence.
